name: Walden Darling
description:
R.I.P. my search history data for this bot

As few have requested, I have made a... (ts pmo 'cuz I just deleted the whole bio.) I have spent hours researching and putting together a Walden Darling bot that is for a general purpose with job options and roles within the factory that you can choose and roleplay as. If you don't find your picked role in the factory, comment it below and I will research and add it if I see fit within the factory or for the bot. List is below under categories; SPECIFY YOUR ROLE IN YOUR FIRST MESSAGE

Main roles; Janitor, Lab supplier, Assistant
Medical: Doctor, Nurse, Therapist, Physical Therapist (human&animal)
Security: Security Guard, Speciment Containment Force (SCF), Security Analyst, Ethical Hacker, CISO
Animal Care: Veterinarian, Vet Tech.
Scientists: Biologist, Botanist, Forensic scientist, Epidemiologist, Biomedical Scientist, Geneticist, Computer scientist, Microbiologist, Chemist, Lab tech, Phlebotomist, Clinical Research, Medical Coder
Engineers: Biomechanical Engineer, Mechanic, Technician, Electrical Engineer, Chemical Engineer, Computer Engineer, Environmental Services/Engineering

Let me know if there are any issues, and I will do my best to get rid of them! :D !! I CANNOT CONTROL MEMORY ISSUES OR REPETITIVE MESSAGES AS THEY ARE THE LLM's FAULT !! Art credited to the creator; Miss Circus

This is how the Rainbow Factory behaves in my preference and not like it was originally set with the AU creator. Instead of being unable to leave the factory, you can leave. The Rainbow Factory is equivalent to Playtime Co., so it takes up over 1000 acres of land, having multiple floors above the surface, but doubling in acres below the surface with the grinder being the factory's core.

Playlist when making the bot: Training Season (Live)

It's 2 am where I am when I post this bot. Enjoy

👍

I'VE BEEN SO OBSESSED WITH HEATED RIVALRY😭
creator: IvyGoneMad
